business.name: Fair and affordable plumbing
business.tagline: Honest plumbing that won't break your budget

hero.headline: Columbia's *most honest* plumber
hero.subheadline: Same-day service, fair prices, and we actually show up when we say we will. 4.7 stars from 108+ neighbors who know the difference.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Every plumbing problem, solved right
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to full installations — if water flows through it, we handle it

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.description: Burst pipes, backed-up drains, water everywhere — we drop what we're doing and come fix it. Even on weekends.

services.title: Toilet Installation & Repair
services.description: New toilet install, fixing leaks, or clearing stubborn clogs that won't budge. Get your bathroom working again.

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Kitchen sinks, tubs backing up, or toilets that won't flush right — we clear it all without the runaround.

services.title: Water Line Repair
services.description: Damaged water lines from accidents or age. We'll get your water flowing again with temporary and permanent fixes.

services.title: Garbage Disposal Service
services.description: Jammed, leaking, or making weird noises? We repair or replace disposals to keep your kitchen running smooth.

about.heading: Straight talk from Columbia plumbers who care
about.body: We're the plumbing company Columbia calls when they need honest work at fair prices. No hidden fees, no surprise charges, just reliable fixes that last. When your plumbing breaks, we show up ready to work — whether it's an emergency Saturday call or a simple toilet install. Our 4.7-star rating comes from neighbors who know we do what we say we'll do.

reviews.name: Dave M.
reviews.text: Wallace came same day when Spectrum ran over our waterline. Fixed it temporarily so we had water, then came back for the permanent repair. Even fixed our disposal while he was here.

reviews.name: JTG
reviews.text: Hands down 5 stars! Best prices in town and Mr. Shanga's work is remarkable. Super fast response time. Won't use anyone else for plumbing.

reviews.name: Yolanda B.
reviews.text: Had flushable wipes backing up our toilets and tub. Fair and Affordable is the perfect name - great job at a great price.

reviews.name: Carla W.
reviews.text: New toilet installed within 24 hours of calling. Will definitely use them again for all my plumbing needs.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbia and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout the Midlands

cta.heading: Ready to fix your plumbing problem?
cta.body: Don't let a small problem become a big headache. Call now for honest pricing and same-day service from Columbia's most trusted plumbers.
